DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF JULIE FERRIOT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE IS GRANTED AS NARROWED IN HIS REPLY BRIEF. PLAINTIFF SHALL PRODUCE TO DEFENDANT NO LATER THAN APRIL 29, 2013: (1) THE CD REFERRED TO IN PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION BRIEF CONTAINING 362 PAGES OF CORRESPONDENCE BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND THE INSURANCE COMPANY, REPAIR ESTIMATES AND PHOTOS OF PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE; (2) A COLOR COPY OF PLAINTIFF'S DRIVER'S LICENSE; (3) THE INSURANCE POLICY: (4) THE INSURANCE DECLARATION PAGE, AND (5) VERIFICATIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION. ONE ORDER FOR ALL THREE MOTIONS ON CALENDAR SIGNED IN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM ANTHONY SCHOENBERG, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ALEXIS BASTEDO, ESQ., 760.697.1330, FOR PLAINTIFF JULIE FERRIOT.
JONATHAN H. ERB, ESQ., 925.225.6838, FOR DEFENDANT DENNIS PATRICK NIX.

PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED THAT THIS MOTION MAY BE DECIDED BY A JUDGE PRO TEM.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF JULIE FERRIOT'S Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Production of Documents, Set One IS GRANTED as narrowed in his reply brief. Plaintiff shall produce to Defendant no later than April 29, 2013: (1) the CD referred to in Plaintiff's opposition brief containing 362 pages of correspondence between Plaintiff and the insurance company, repair estimates and photos of Plaintiff's vehicle; (2) a color copy of Plaintiff's driver's license; (3) the insurance policy: (4) the insurance declaration page, and (5) verifications to Plaintiff's supplemental responses to Defendant's form interrogatories, requests for admission, and requests for production. ONE ORDER FOR ALL THREE MOTIONS ON CALENDAR SIGNED IN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM ANTHONY SCHOENBERG, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
